title: verbascum leiocarpum
intro: Verbascum leiocarpum, also known as the woolly mullein or giant mullein, is a biennial plant that belongs to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of mucilage, a soothing and protective substance. The health benefits of Verbascum leiocarpum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve skin conditions like eczema. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be applied topically to the skin or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
